name: Palatium Real Estate AG
summary: Palatium Real Estate AG engages in the acquisition and sale of land and buildings in Germany. It is also involved in the construction and sale of buildings for commercial or residential purposes; acquisition, management, and sale of assets of various kinds, including equity interests; and purchase and sale of precious metals and antiques. The company was formerly known as Volkmann Verm√É¬∂gens Verwaltungs AktienGesellschaft and changed its name to Palatium Real Estate AG in March 2016. Palatium Real Estate AG was founded in 1999 and is based in Hochspeyer, Germany.
